title: MagAttract + Metapolyzyme Metagenomic gDNA Extraction from Urine
author: Natalie Ring
materials: Quantify DNA using Qubit dsDNA HS kit. If DNA concentration is an appropriate concentration for your experiment (for us, this means at least 0.2 ng/µl), continue to clean-up steps. Qubit® dsDNA HS Assay Kit Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #Q32854 1 µL, DNA 199 µL, Qubit dsDNA HS working solution

Quantify DNA using Qubit dsDNA HS kit. If DNA concentration is an appropriate concentration for your experiment (for us, this means at least 0.2 ng/µl), continue to library preparation. Qubit® dsDNA HS Assay Kit Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #Q32854 1 µL, DNA 199 µL, Qubit dsDNA HS working solution

steps.title: Pellet 2x 1
steps.instruction: Pellet 2x 1.5 ml aliquots of urine in 1.5 ml tubes by centrifuging at maximum speed (~13,000 RPM/16,000 xg) for 20 minutes, then discard supernatant 3 mL, urine 16,000 x g, Room temperature, 20 minutes We have found that this extended spin at the beginning of the protocol results in much better yield of bacterial gDNA, especially in samples with low bacterial abundance

steps.title: Resuspend cell pellets (which might be...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cell pellets (which might be invisible) and combine in 160 µl buffer P1 (50 mM Tris, 10 mM EDTA, pH 8.0) 160 µL, buffer P1

steps.title: Add 20 µl metapolyzyme (3
steps.instruction: Add 20 µl metapolyzyme (3.3 mg/ml, 5 mg resuspended in 1500 µl PBS) and mix by flicking the tube 20 µL, metapolyzyme (3.3 mg/ml)

steps.title: Incubate on a thermomixer for 60...
steps.instruction: Incubate on a thermomixer for 60 minutes at 37°C with 900 RPM shaking 900 rpm, 37 °C, 1 hour

steps.title: Add 20 µl MagAttract proteinase K...
steps.instruction: Add 20 µl MagAttract proteinase K and mix by flicking the tube 20 µL, proteinase K

steps.title: Incubate on a thermomixer for 30...
steps.instruction: Incubate on a thermomixer for 30 minutes at 56°C with 900 RPM shaking 900 rpm, 56 °C, 30 minutes

steps.title: Add 150 µl MagAttract buffer AL...
steps.instruction: Add 150 µl MagAttract buffer AL and mix by pulse vortexing 150 µL, buffer AL Our standard "pulse vortex" is 10 short (<1 second) pulses per tube

steps.title: Add 15 µl MagAttract Suspension G...
steps.instruction: Add 15 µl MagAttract Suspension G and 280 µl MagAttract buffer MB and mix by pulse vortexing 15 µL, Suspension G 280 µL, Buffer MB Make sure the magnetic beads (Suspension G) are really well mixed before adding them! The whole suspension should be black, not separated into a bead layer and a clear layer. We usually resuspended by vortexing for 10 or more seconds.

steps.title: Spin down briefly, then pellet beads...
steps.instruction: Spin down briefly, then pellet beads on magnet and remove supernatant

steps.title: Add 700 µl MagAttract buffer MW1...
steps.instruction: Add 700 µl MagAttract buffer MW1 and incubate on a thermomixer for 1 minute at room temperature with 1,400 RPM shaking 700 µL, buffer MW1 1400 rpm, Room temperature, 1 minute

steps.title: Repeat steps 10 and 11
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 10 and 11

steps.title: Spin down briefly, then pellet beads...
steps.instruction: Spin down briefly, then pellet beads on magnet and remove supernatant

steps.title: Add 700 µl MagAttract buffer PE...
steps.instruction: Add 700 µl MagAttract buffer PE and incubate on a thermomixer for 1 minute at room temperature with 1,400 RPM shaking 700 µL, buffer PE 1400 rpm, Room temperature, 1 minute

steps.title: Repeat steps 13 and 14
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 13 and 14

steps.title: Spin down briefly, then pellet beads...
steps.instruction: Spin down briefly, then pellet beads on magnet and remove supernatant

steps.title: Rinse the pelleted beads on the...
steps.instruction: Rinse the pelleted beads on the magnetic rack with 700 µl distilled water by pipetting down the opposite wall of the tube, then incubate for 1 minute on the magnetic rack 700 µL, distilled water

steps.title: Remove distilled water
steps.instruction: Remove distilled water

steps.title: Add 50 µl nuclease-free water off...
steps.instruction: Add 50 µl nuclease-free water off the magnet, to resuspend the bead pellet 50 µL, nuclease-free water

steps.title: Incubate on a thermomixer for 3...
steps.instruction: Incubate on a thermomixer for 3 minutes at room temperature with 1,400 RPM shaking 1400 rpm, Room temperature, 3 minutes

steps.title: Spin down briefly, then pellet beads...
steps.instruction: Spin down briefly, then pellet beads on magnetic rack and keep supernatant in a low-DNA binding 1.5 mL tube (e.g. Eppendorf or Sarstedt )

steps.title: Add 150 µl room temperature ProNex...
steps.instruction: Add 150 µl room temperature ProNex beads to your entire tube of DNA (49 µl) 200 µL, ProNex beads Like the magnetic beads in Suspension G, make sure the ProNex beads are really well mixed (10+ seconds of vortexing) immediately before you use them.

steps.title: Mix well by slowly pipetting up and down 10 times
steps.instruction: Mix well by slowly pipetting up and down 10 times

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 10...
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes (no shaking needed) 00:10:00 Room temperature

steps.title: Spin down briefly, then pellet beads...
steps.instruction: Spin down briefly, then pellet beads on magnet and remove supernatant

steps.title: Rinse the pelleted beads on the...
steps.instruction: Rinse the pelleted beads on the magnetic rack by pipetting 200 µl ProNex Wash Buffer down the opposite wall of the tube , then incubate at room temperature for 60 seconds (no shaking), then remove Wash Buffer 200 µL, Wash Buffer Room temperature 00:01:00

steps.title: Repeat step 26
steps.instruction: Repeat step 26

steps.title: Air-dry (lid open) the sample on...
steps.instruction: Air-dry (lid open) the sample on the magnetic rack for 5 minutes (longer is OK, no more than 60 minutes) Room temperature 00:05:00

steps.title: Add 20 µl nuclease-free water off the magnet
steps.instruction: Add 20 µl nuclease-free water off the magnet. Resuspend the pellet by flicking the tube , then incubate at room temperature for 5 minutes (no shaking needed) 20 µL, nuclease-free water Room temperature 00:05:00

steps.title: Spin down briefly, then pellet the...
steps.instruction: Spin down briefly, then pellet the beads on magnet and keep supernatant in a low DNA-binding tube

steps.title: Incubate on a thermomixer for 3...
steps.instruction: Incubate on a thermomixer for 3 minutes at room temperature with 1,400 RPM shaking 1400 rpm, Room temperature, 3 minutes

steps.title: Repeat steps 17 and 18
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 17 and 18

steps.title: Spin down briefly, then pellet beads...
steps.instruction: Spin down briefly, then pellet beads on magnet and remove any remaining supernatant
